hibernate-mapping.sql-query:
SELECT cast(result.facility as varchar(256)) as facility, cast(result.requestorType as varchar(256)) as requestorType, cast(result.requestorName as varchar(256)) as requestorName, cast(result.requestId as varchar(50)) as requestId, cast(result.billable as varchar(20)) as billable, cast(result.requestCost as varchar(50)) requestCost, cast(result.totalPages as varchar(50)) totalPages, cast(result.patientName as varchar(256)) patientName, cast(result.PatientMRN as varchar(50)) patientMRN
FROM
( -- For HPF patients (SELECT requestCharges.FACILITY_NAME as facility, requestor.RequestorTypeName as requestorType, case when requestor.NameLast IS NULL then '' else requestor.NameLast end + case when requestor.NameFirst = '' then '' when requestor.NameFirst IS NULL then '' else ', ' + requestor.NameFirst end + case when requestor.NameMiddle IS NULL then '' else ' ' + requestor.NameMiddle end as requestorName, requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq as requestId, (case when requestCharges.Unbillable = 0 then 'true' else 'false' end) as billable, (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.Base_Charge) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv where inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCharges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and inv.Type = 'Invoice'), 0))as requestCost, cast(((COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(page.ROI_Pages_Seq) FROM ROI_Pages page, ROI_Versions version, ROI_Documents document, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients pat WHERE page.ROI_Versions_Seq = version.ROI_Versions_Seq AND document.ROI_Documents_Seq = version.ROI_Documents_Seq AND document.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND pat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0)) + (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(docs.PAGECOUNT) FROM ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore docs, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients pat WHERE docs.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND pat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0)) + (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CAST(attachment.PAGECOUNT as int)) FROM ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore attachment, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients pat WHERE attachment.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND pat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0)) + (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(docs.PAGECOUNT) FROM ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore docs, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat WHERE docs.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND pat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0)) + (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(attachment.PAGECOUNT) FROM ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore attachment, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat WHERE attachment.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND pat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0))) as varchar(50)) as totalPages, hpfPatients.NAME as patientName, hpfPatients.MRN as patientMRN
FROM
ROI_RequestCoreCharges as requestCharges, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor as requestor, ROI_RequestCore as requestCore, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients requestCoreToPatients, ROI_PATIENTS hpfPatients, ROI_Encounters hpfEncounters
WHERE
requestCharges.Facility_Code in (:facilities) AND requestor.RequestorTypeName in (:requestorTypes) AND requestCore.Created_Dt between :fromDate and :toDate AND (:requestType IS NOT NULL and ((:requestType = 'Billable' and requestCore.Unbillable = 0) OR(:requestType = 'Un-Billable' and requestCore.Unbillable = 1)) or :requestType IS NULL) AND requestCharges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCoreToPatients.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND requestCoreToPatients.ROI_Patients_Seq = hpfPatients.ROI_Patients_Seq AND hpfPatients.ROI_Patients_Seq = hpfEncounters.ROI_Patients_Seq AND invoice.Type = 'Invoice'
)
UNION
--For ROI Patients (SELECT
requestCharges.FACILITY_NAME as facility, requestor.RequestorTypeName as requestorType, case when requestor.NameLast IS NULL then '' else requestor.NameLast end + case when requestor.NameFirst = '' then '' when requestor.NameFirst IS NULL then '' else ', ' + requestor.NameFirst end + case when requestor.NameMiddle IS NULL then '' else ' ' + requestor.NameMiddle end as requestorName, requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq as requestId, (case when requestCharges.Unbillable = 0 then 'true' else 'false' end) as billable, (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(inv.Base_Charge) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv where inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCharges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and inv.Type = 'Invoice'), 0))as requestCost, cast(((COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(page.ROI_Pages_Seq) FROM ROI_Pages page, ROI_Versions version, ROI_Documents document, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients pat WHERE page.ROI_Versions_Seq = version.ROI_Versions_Seq AND document.ROI_Documents_Seq = version.ROI_Documents_Seq AND document.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND pat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0)) + (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(docs.PAGECOUNT) FROM ROI_SupplementarityDocumentsCore docs, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients pat WHERE docs.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND pat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0)) + (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CAST(attachment.PAGECOUNT as int)) FROM ROI_SupplementarityAttachmentsCore attachment, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_Patients pat WHERE attachment.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND pat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0)) + (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(docs.PAGECOUNT) FROM ROI_SupplementalDocumentsCore docs, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat WHERE docs.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND pat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0)) + (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(attachment.PAGECOUNT) FROM ROI_SupplementalAttachmentsCore attachment, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat WHERE attachment.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND pat.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq), 0))) as varchar(50)) as totalPages, (case when roiPatients.LASTNAME IS NULL then '' else roiPatients.LASTNAME end + case when roiPatients.FIRSTNAME = '' then '' when roiPatients.FIRSTNAME IS NULL then '' else ', ' + roiPatients.FIRSTNAME end) as patientName, roiPatients.MRN as patientMRN
FROM
ROI_RequestCoreCharges as requestCharges, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor as requestor, ROI_RequestCore as requestCore, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice, ROI_RequestCoretoROI_SupplementalPatientsCore requestCoreToSuppPatCore, ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore roiPatients
WHERE
requestCharges.Facility_Code in (:facilities) AND requestor.RequestorTypeName in (:requestorTypes) AND requestCore.Created_Dt between :fromDate and :toDate AND (:requestType IS NOT NULL and ((:requestType = 'Billable' and requestCore.Unbillable = 0) OR(:requestType = 'Un-Billable' and requestCore.Unbillable = 1)) or :requestType IS NULL) AND requestCharges.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCoreToSuppPatCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND requestCoreToSuppPatCore.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = roiPatients.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq AND invoice.Type = 'Invoice' )
) as result ORDER BY facility asc, requestorType asc

declare @name varchar(50) declare @ledgerSeq bigint declare @amount decimal(18,2) declare @tmp table (name varchar(50), ledgerSeq bigint, amount decimal(18,2)) set @ledgerSeq = (select top 1 [ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] from [ROI_LedgerAccount] order by [ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq])
while @ledgerSeq is not null begin set @name = (select name from [ROI_LedgerAccount] where [ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] = @ledgerSeq) set @amount = (select COALESCE(SUM(rjd.Amount),0.0) as increaseamount FROM ROI_JournalDetail rjd where rjd.ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq = @ledgerSeq and rjd.TxnOccurenceTimestamp >= :startDate and rjd.TxnOccurenceTimestamp <= :endDate and rjd.DecreaseIncreaseFlag = 1 ) - (select COALESCE(SUM(rjd.Amount),0.0) as decreaseamount FROM ROI_JournalDetail rjd where rjd.ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq = @ledgerSeq and rjd.TxnOccurenceTimestamp >= :startDate and rjd.TxnOccurenceTimestamp <= :endDate and rjd.DecreaseIncreaseFlag = 0 ) insert @tmp select @name, @ledgerSeq, @amount set @ledgerSeq = (select top 1 [ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] from [ROI_LedgerAccount] where [ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq] > @ledgerSeq order by [ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq]) end select * from @tmp
